title: Reflected XSS via URL Path in /archive/ Endpoint - CrowdStream - Bugcrowd
how_to_find: Reflected XSS via URL Path in /archive/ Endpoint - CrowdStream - Bugcrowd

summary.vuln_point: Reflected XSS: attacker-controlled input is reflected in the response without correct encoding.
summary.impact: Arbitrary JavaScript execution in victim browsers; can lead to account takeover actions depending on context.
